case_title: BARBARA OCCHIOGROSSO VS. CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-01-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFIRA COURT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCCHIOGROSSO, BARBARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SAFIRA COURT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION THE SAFIRA COURT HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION HAS A RESPONSIBILTY TO REPAIR, REPLACE THE COMMON AREAS BUT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT SHE COMPLIED WITH THE ASSOCIATIONS ARD PROCEDURES BEFORE FILING THIS LAWSUIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
